tagline: A sharp, healthy lawn every week — mowing, landscaping, and turf care done right across McDonough and Locust Grove.
services_intro: Full-service lawn and landscape care for homes and businesses — dependable crews, clean cuts, and turf that stays green season after season.
service_1_desc: Regular cutting, edging, and trimming to keep your yard sharp year-round.
service_2_desc: Custom landscape installation, beds, and grading for curb appeal.
service_3_desc: Lawn aeration and hydroseeding to build a thick, healthy turf.
review_1_quote: A sharp weekly cut, crisp edges, and the yard left spotless every time — the kind of dependable service homeowners count on.
review_2_quote: Honest pricing on a full front-bed redo and grading job, with work that holds up season to season.
review_3_quote: Aeration and hydroseeding that fills in bare patches thick and green within a few weeks.
about_paragraph: Warner Lawn Care Service is a locally owned lawn and landscape company based in McDonough, Georgia, proudly serving homeowners and businesses throughout Henry County and Locust Grove. With a 4.7-star reputation trusted across the area, we handle everything from weekly mowing and maintenance to full landscape design, aeration, and hydroseeding. Our crews are dependable, our pricing is straightforward, and our goal is simple: a lawn you're proud of without the hassle. Give us a call to set up a free quote.
